name: Camaradas 8k demo pieces
description:
One of the shaders I did for the Tangatos 8K demo in Revision 2026: https://youtu.be/yRE5YmymLHk?si=1-BSMH9C2m9DJaCE&t=203

The demo shaders were done in isolation, and then got composed together with icid and jeenio while drinking beers and sharing ideas
